issues_list.title: Set up prompt editor with variable detection
issues_list.description: CodeMirror editor with custom syntax highlighting for {{variable}} placeholders and auto-generated input fields

test_strategy.automated_tests: Unit test: variable detection regex, input field generation
test_strategy.manual_verification: Type prompt with {{variables}}, verify inputs appear and update preview

issues_list.title: Implement multi-provider LLM adapter layer
issues_list.description: Provider interface with Claude, GPT-4, and Gemini adapters. Parallel execution with SSE streaming

test_strategy.automated_tests: Integration test: each adapter returns valid stream. Mock provider for unit tests
test_strategy.manual_verification: Run prompt against all 3 providers, verify streaming responses appear

issues_list.title: Build side-by-side response comparison
issues_list.description: Response panels displaying streaming output with token count, latency, cost, and rating controls

test_strategy.automated_tests: Component test: panels render, expand/collapse works, ratings saved
test_strategy.manual_verification: Run multi-provider test, rate responses, expand one panel to full width

issues_list.title: Add prompt version history with diffs
issues_list.description: Auto-save versions on each run. Version list with timestamps and quality scores. Diff view between any two versions

test_strategy.automated_tests: Unit test: diff computation, version ordering. Integration test: save and retrieve versions
test_strategy.manual_verification: Run prompt 3 times, open history, compare v1 vs v3 diff

issues_list.title: Implement response quality scoring
issues_list.description: Automated scoring (format compliance, length, coverage) plus manual thumbs up/down. Quality trend sparkline

test_strategy.automated_tests: Unit test: scoring algorithm with known inputs. Component test: sparkline renders
test_strategy.manual_verification: Run prompt, check auto-score appears, rate manually, verify trend chart

issues_list.title: Create prompt template library
issues_list.description: Template gallery with categories, search, preview, and one-click load. Save-as-template from editor

test_strategy.automated_tests: Component test: category filter, search, template load into editor
test_strategy.manual_verification: Browse templates, preview one, load it, customize and save as new template

definition_of_done: Each feature independently testable by a human, all acceptance criteria met
